script_text: In fact books, pictures are not just decoration.
They show what words might not be able to say easily.
A diagram shows parts of something.
Arrows and labels point to each part.
Easier to see than to read!
A map shows where things are.
Photos show real things close up.
Together they make facts come alive!
When you see a picture, ask: how does this match the text?
Now you are ready to use pictures to understand facts!
